query:
UPDATE kanban_tasks SET
            title = CASE WHEN $1 = '' THEN title ELSE NULLIF($2, '')::text END,
            body = CASE WHEN $3 = $4 THEN body ELSE $5 END,
            channel_id = CASE WHEN $6 = -999999::bigint THEN channel_id ELSE $7 END,
            profile = CASE WHEN $8 = '' THEN profile ELSE NULLIF($9, '')::text END,
            priority = CASE WHEN $10 = -999999::bigint THEN priority::bigint ELSE $11 END,
            status = CASE WHEN $12 = '' THEN status ELSE $13 END,
            archived = $14,
            template = CASE WHEN $15 = '' THEN template ELSE NULLIF($16, '')::text END,
            plan = $17,
            updated_at = NOW()
        WHERE id = $18
